business_hours: Monday to Thursday 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Friday 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM. Closed Saturday and Sunday
office_address: 782 Oak Avenue, Building B, Austin, TX 78701
emergency_definition: Severe tooth pain, knocked-out tooth, uncontrolled bleeding from the mouth, jaw injury, or swelling that affects breathing or swallowing
emergency_routing_rules: Forward to our emergency answering service at 512-555-0147. They will page the on-call dentist
non_emergency_routing_rules: Collect patient name, phone number, and reason for call. Send details via email to frontdesk@sunrisedental.com for next business day follow-up
call_transfer_rules: Transfer directly to the front desk reception line at extension 10. If busy, hold for 30 seconds then offer to take a message
integration_constraints: We use Dentrix for patient management. Clara should not attempt to access or modify patient records. All information collected should be treated as intake notes only
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours: Greet caller, determine urgency, collect info, route emergencies or take messages for callbacks.
office_hours_flow_summary: Standard office hours protocol: greet caller, identify purpose, collect name and phone, transfer to appropriate party, fallback if unavailable.
notes: Patients frequently ask about location and parking. Our parking lot is behind the building with free patient parking. Also, we accept most PPO insurance plans — Clara can let callers know to bring their insurance card to appointments.
